tagline: Unstyled inline stat primitive — value + label (+ delta) as one phrase.
whenToUse: Use Statistic Block for a bare value + label (and optional trend delta) that sits inside another surface — a stat row in a Seller Card ("98% positive · 1.2k sales"), a page header, or a summary strip. It is the primitive Metric Card wraps in a Card: reach for Metric Card when you want the full KPI card chrome (border, padding, sparkline, drill-down); reach for Statistic Block when you only need the inline number and its own container already provides the framing.
